property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-24\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\oracle\product\10.2.0\db_1\bin;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\java8path;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\MinGW\bin;C:\Program Files\Python312;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Server 8.0\bin;C:\Program Files\Python312\Scripts;C:\Users\AMIT GUPTA\anaconda3;C:\Users\AMIT GUPTA\anaconda3\Scripts;C:\Users\AMIT GUPTA\anaconda3\Library\bin;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-24\bin;C:\Program Files\Java\jre1.8.0_441\bin;C:\Program Files\Java\latest\jre-1.8\bin;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\apache-maven-3.9.15\bin;C:\apache-maven-3.9.15\bin;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.0\bin\;C:\Users\AMIT GUPTA\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Launcher\;C:\Users\AMIT GUPTA\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\AMIT GUPTA\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\PyCharm Community Edition 2022.3.2\bin;;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-24\bin;C:\Users\AMIT GUPTA\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop\bin;C:\Users\AMIT GUPTA\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Users\AMIT GUPTA\.dotnet\tools;.

testcase.name: aggregatesPermissionsAndSortsUsersAndRepositories
testcase.system-out: 2026-07-14T19:48:09.227+05:30 INFO 12704 --- [github-access-report] [ main] c.g.accessreport.service.GithubService : Processing 2 repositories for GitHub organization example-org 2026-07-14T19:48:09.238+05:30 INFO 12704 --- [github-access-report] [ main] c.g.accessreport.service.GithubService : Processed 2 repositories and generated a GitHub access report for 2 users in 14 ms

testcase.name: propagatesNonNotFoundRepositoryFailures
testcase.system-out:
2026-07-14T19:48:09.256+05:30 INFO 12704 --- [github-access-report] [ main] c.g.accessreport.service.GithubService : Processing 1 repositories for GitHub organization example-org 2026-07-14T19:48:09.257+05:30 ERROR 12704 --- [github-access-report] [ main] c.g.accessreport.service.GithubService : Failed to generate GitHub access report: denied 2026-07-14T19:48:09.258+05:30 WARN 12704 --- [github-access-report] [ main] c.g.b.caffeine.cache.LocalAsyncCache : Exception thrown during asynchronous load

testcase.name: skipsRepositoryThatDisappearsAfterEnumeration
testcase.system-out: 2026-07-14T19:48:09.276+05:30 INFO 12704 --- [github-access-report] [ main] c.g.accessreport.service.GithubService : Processing 2 repositories for GitHub organization example-org 2026-07-14T19:48:09.276+05:30 INFO 12704 --- [github-access-report] [ main] c.g.accessreport.service.GithubService : Skipping repository Gone because it no longer exists 2026-07-14T19:48:09.277+05:30 INFO 12704 --- [github-access-report] [ main] c.g.accessreport.service.GithubService : Processed 2 repositories and generated a GitHub access report for 1 users in 1 ms

testcase.name: reusesSuccessfulCachedReport
testcase.system-out: 2026-07-14T19:48:09.287+05:30 INFO 12704 --- [github-access-report] [ main] c.g.accessreport.service.GithubService : Processing 1 repositories for GitHub organization example-org 2026-07-14T19:48:09.288+05:30 INFO 12704 --- [github-access-report] [ main] c.g.accessreport.service.GithubService : Processed 1 repositories and generated a GitHub access report for 1 users in 1 ms
